title: SpecificationResult
description: SpecificationResult: Object representing result of verification of a Specification.

Specification.description: Specification that was verified. Specification: A top level object in verification workflow. Contains the information about the whole workflow, from extraction, to checking, to reporting.

ExtractedObjects.description: Objects collected during the extraction stage and checked against the requirements.

RequirementResults.description: Collection of verification results of each filtered object against each Requirement contained within the Specification.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
